positive: A minimalist, stylized geometric owl silhouette perched on a branch, surrounded by abstract, glowing nebula dust and stylized crescent moons. The style is a blend of Art Deco elegance and modern Nordic minimalism, utilizing deep indigo, muted teal, burnished gold, and crisp cream tones. The owl is sharply detailed with clean lines and exaggerated wing shapes, ensuring high contrast against the deep background. Central composition, designed for apparel printing, with strong negative space and perfect symmetry. Graphic novel quality, flat graphic elements, vectors, suitable for screen printing, hyper-clean, high resolution.
